case_studies.challenge: Needed a national-scale digital registry model with governance, auditability, and operational control.
case_studies.result: Demonstrated DALP credibility for sovereign-grade digital asset infrastructure and controlled lifecycle operations.
case_studies.quote: Proof that digital asset infrastructure needs governance and lifecycle control, not just token minting.

case_studies.challenge: Required bank-grade issuance support with compliance and operational rigor beyond a demo workflow.
case_studies.result: Hybrid on/off-chain ETP issuance with Boerse Stuttgart listing; settlement under 10 seconds; projected savings of EUR 7M/year.
case_studies.quote: Bank deployments care about servicing, controls, and auditability as much as issuance.

case_studies.challenge: Needed a programmable transaction banking foundation that fit regulated institutional workflows.
case_studies.result: FX tokenization (MYRT) and cross-border settlement via Exchange-versus-Payment (XvP); atomic cross-currency swaps.
case_studies.quote: The platform has to fit existing bank controls, not force a side-project architecture.

case_studies.challenge: Needed a compliant path to bring digital securities into an existing investor distribution motion.
case_studies.result: Smart contract backend for crowdfunding issuance, lifecycle, corporate actions, and redemption with fiat-backed stable token.
case_studies.quote: Distribution matters when digital assets need to reach real investors, not just test wallets.

case_studies.challenge: Required a security token engine for securitization, tokenization, and fractionalization of off-chain assets targeting HNWIs.
case_studies.result: Live security token engine enabling fractionalization to 10K SGD, expanding HNWI access to previously illiquid instruments.
case_studies.quote: Fractionalization opens institutional-grade products to investors who were previously locked out by minimum thresholds.

case_studies.challenge: Settlement process involved multiple custody intermediaries, creating counterparty risk and settlement delays impacting liquidity across Asia, Africa, and the Middle East.
case_studies.result: Blockchain-based Digital Virtual Exchange with fractional tokenization of securities, instant on-chain settlement, and elimination of custody intermediaries.
case_studies.quote: Instant settlement and custody elimination — that's the efficiency gain institutional investors actually care about.

case_studies.challenge: Needed bond tokenization with standard platform capabilities for East Asian markets, supporting cross-currency settlement between AED and JPY.
case_studies.result: Bond tokenization PoC completed with emphasis on standard platform capabilities; production planning stage underway.
case_studies.quote: Cross-currency bond settlement on a single platform — that's what multi-jurisdiction deployment looks like.

case_studies.challenge: Required tokenized equity issuance on a dedicated mainnet with corporate actions, on-chain voting, and institutional custody integration.
case_studies.result: Regulated equity tokenization on ADI mainnet with full corporate action support and institutional custody integration.
case_studies.quote: Equity tokenization needs corporate actions and voting built in — not bolted on after the fact.
